notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Bryan Reynolds reaches on a fielder's choice. Konnor Griffin to 2nd. Konnor Griffin advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by shortstop CJ Abrams.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Jake Mangum singles on a ground ball to shortstop CJ Abrams. Esmerlyn Valdez to 3rd. Esmerlyn Valdez advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by shortstop CJ Abrams.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Esmerlyn Valdez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Esmerlyn Valdez grounds into a double play, third baseman Jorbit Vivas to second baseman Nasim Nuñez to first baseman Luis García Jr. Bryan Reynolds out at 2nd. Esmerlyn Valdez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Esmerlyn Valdez rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Esmerlyn Valdez grounds into a double play, third baseman Jorbit Vivas to second baseman Nasim Nuñez to first baseman Luis García Jr. Bryan Reynolds out at 2nd. Esmerlyn Valdez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Pirates challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Jake Mangum steals (15) 2nd base.
